hooks.command: bash -c 'r="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; [ -n "$r" ] && cd "$r" || exit 0; command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] || exit 0; CI=true pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts || echo "[worktree-setup] pnpm install failed; run pnpm install manually in this worktree"'
